title: A Resolution authorizing the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) through the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Neil Andrew N. Nocon to Enter into Agreement with Makiling Medica Drugstore, a Duly Organized Local Business with Office Address at ES Plaza. Grove, Barangay Batong Malake, Los Baños, Laguna as a partner in the provision and/or dispensing of medicines to qualified beneficiaries under the Damayan sa Kapwa Program.
